padelModels.title: Our Padel Courts
padelModels.subtitle: Solutions built to excel. Explore our models designed for every need.
padelModels.compareSubtitle: Discover the technical differences and choose the perfect court for you.

models.name: EXTRA SOLID
models.subtitle: WHERE THE GAME BECOMES LEGEND: THE ULTIMATE PADEL COURT!
paragraphs: Our court combines an entry-level design with high-end features.
The structure is built with an electro-welded mesh fence, enhanced with self-supporting pillars with reinforced tubes (80x40 mm) and additional reinforcements of the same thickness.
All metal components are hot-dip galvanized or oven-painted in the client's chosen color, while stainless steel hardware ensures resistance and durability.
Tempered glass panels, available in 10 or 12 mm thickness, feature carefully finished and beveled edges for an elegant look and enhanced safety.

specs.bolts: Bolts, ties and nuts in 304 stainless steel (A2).

models.name: PANORAMIC
models.subtitle: WIDE GLASS PANELS AND QUALITY MATERIALS, PUT YOUR CLIENTS IN THE SPOTLIGHT
paragraphs: The padel court that redefines the game.

Elegance, innovation and solidity meet in an unprecedented padel court. With a structure featuring few iron pillars, it offers unobstructed visibility and a minimalist design that enhances the playing experience.
The wide glass panels transform the court into a true spectacle, creating a sensation of openness and freedom never seen before.
🔥 More than a court, an icon! Are you ready to play padel like never before?

models.name: SUPER PANORAMIC
models.subtitle: THE TOP OF THE RANGE FOR ELEGANCE AND PERFORMANCE
paragraphs: Discover the pinnacle of innovation and design with our top-of-the-range model.
Designed to offer an unprecedented playing experience. With unobstructed wide glass panels, this court delivers crystal-clear game viewing.
Maximum resistance, elegance and performance: modern architecture that enhances both play and aesthetics.
Perfect for clubs, tournaments and exclusive venues.

specs.structure: Load-bearing glass with minimal steel reinforcements.

models.name: NATUR HYBRID
models.subtitle: SOLID AS STEEL, NATURAL AS WOOD
paragraphs: The base is made of pre-galvanized steel, oven-painted in the client's chosen color, combined with treated laminated wood.
A unique mix of materials for an authentic playing experience.
Refinement and solidity in a single structure with elegant and innovative design.
The perfect fusion of robustness and style: the strength of steel and the nobility of wood.

specs.structure: Galvanized steel and structural laminated wood.

process.label: Our Method
process.title: From vision to court.
process.subtitle: An engineered 4-phase process to turn your idea into a sports facility of excellence.

steps.title: Analysis & Consultation
steps.desc: Feasibility study, site or existing structure analysis, and definition of technical-commercial objectives together with the client.

steps.desc: Development of the engineering project, from layout to structural model, including materials, covers, and budgeting.

steps.title: Installation
steps.desc: We operate with specialized teams ensuring millimetric precision. Fast timelines and turnkey site management.

steps.title: Testing & Support
steps.desc: Verification of playability and safety standards. Delivery of the finished facility with after-sales support and maintenance.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.subtitle: Clear information on costs, permits, and construction standards for opening your sports centre.

items.q: How much does it cost to build a padel court?
items.a: The cost varies depending on the chosen model (Extra Solid, Panoramic, Super Panoramic), terrain type, and options (advanced LED lighting, glass thickness). We offer custom quotes after a careful preliminary analysis in order to optimize your investment.

Installing sports facilities and covers usually requires municipal permits depending on local regulations and zoning. Upon request, our team provides the technical support necessary to facilitate the bureaucratic process.

items.q: What type of covers do you offer?
items.a: We design and install various solutions to ensure maximum flexibility: from high-efficiency air domes to premium tensile structures in laminated wood or steel, all designed to guarantee playability 365 days a year while minimizing maintenance costs.
Absolutely. We work in compliance with current structural regulations. All our materials and installations meet the strictest European standards for sports performance and safety.

items.q: How big is a tennis court?
items.a: A regulation singles tennis court measures 23.77 m in length by 8.23 m in width (10.97 m for doubles). These are minimum dimensions, and it's essential to add side and back run-off areas, which we will define together by analyzing the spaces of your facility.

finalCta.subheadline: Let's shape your next premium facility. Let's talk about the right project for your space.

padelPage.title: Padel Courts
padelPage.subtitle: Visual spectacle and extreme engineering. Premium padel by PlayInnovation.
padelPage.description:
Our padel courts are not simple fences, but advanced sports ecosystems. From structural layout design up to micro-details (such as the angle of the floodlights and the thickness of the glass), every component is designed for maximum playability and resistance to the most aggressive weather conditions.

Whether it's the Extra Solid model designed for maximum workload, or the Super Panoramic dedicated to pure visual spectacle, we guarantee a millimeter-perfect installation that will elevate the prestige of your sports club.
features: Hot-dip galvanized steel structures or oven-painted.
Laminated tempered glass of 10 or 12 mm with polished edges.
Asymmetric LED lighting systems for zero glare.
Latest generation textured synthetic turf, WPT approved.
Concealed stainless steel hardware for maximum player safety.

items.name: Structure
items.desc: Fe360B steel with thickness up to 3mm, hot-dip galvanized.

items.name: Glass
items.desc: 12mm safety tempered glass panels, certified and tested.

items.name: Lighting
items.desc: 8 asymmetric 200W LED floodlights, designed for uniform lighting.

surfaces.title: Our Surfaces
surfaces.subtitle: Surfaces designed for maximum grip and performance.

items.name: Textured Turf
items.desc: The top for professional play: reduces joint stress and ensures consistent bounces.

items.name: Fibrated Turf
items.desc: Excellent durability and ease of maintenance, ideal for high-traffic clubs.

tennisPage.title: Tennis Courts
tennisPage.subtitle: From amateur clubs to ATP tournaments. Engineered surfaces for bounce perfection.
tennisPage.description:
We know that in tennis, the millimeter makes the difference. This is why we build courts taking obsessive care of the slopes for water drainage and the homogeneity of the surfaces.

Whether it's the timeless charm of red clay (made with the best porous and volcanic subbases) or the high-tech synthetic resins (with integrated shock pads to reduce joint trauma), we meticulously install fencing, lighting systems, and accessory components to provide an unparalleled premium facility.
features: Construction from scratch inclusive of excavations, screeds, and certified drainage systems.
Red Clay, Synthetic Resin, or Synthetic Grass surfaces ITF approved.
Bounce tests performed during testing in accordance with international regulations.
LED lighting systems with technical lighting specifications for TV broadcasts.
Perimeter fencing and high structural tightness windbreaker systems.

items.name: Fencing
items.desc: High-tension nets with polymer coating, corrosion resistant.

items.name: Lighting
items.desc: Light towers with 400W LED projectors for international match standards.

items.name: Drainage
items.desc: Honeycomb systems and drainage pipes for immediate playability after rain.

surfaces.title: Our Surfaces
surfaces.subtitle: The perfect surface for your playing style.

items.name: Red Clay
items.desc: Traditional charm with volcanic material sub-base for extreme comfort.

items.name: Acrylic Resin
items.desc: Fast and performing surface with 7 layers of integrated cushioning.

items.name: Synthetic Grass
items.desc: Low maintenance and playability all year round, with silica sand infill.

pickleballPage.title: Pickleball Courts
pickleballPage.subtitle: The fastest-growing sport format in the world. Designed for pure action.
pickleballPage.description:
Pickleball requires a surface that offers the right compromise between slide and grip, with perfect visibility of the layout. We install both indoor and outdoor courts optimally utilizing available spaces.

Our multi-layer synthetic surfaces are designed to cushion impacts, reduce player fatigue, and ensure an accurate and constant ball bounce in every area of the court. The compact size of the court allows us to easily transform disused areas into highly profitable revenue centers for your club.
features: Strictly regulation playing dimensions (13.41m x 6.10m) with corresponding run-off areas.
Multi-layer acrylic resin flooring systems with high acoustic absorption.
High-visibility line marking resistant to wear and UV rays.
Supply and installation of professional nets with integrated tensioning systems.
Space convertibility: systems to overlay the layout on existing courts.

materials.title: Materials
materials.subtitle: New standards for the new discipline.

items.name: Net System
items.desc: Painted steel posts with professional ratchet tensioning system.

items.name: Finish
items.desc: High-resistance polyurethane paints against abrasion and ball strikes.

items.name: Pro Cushion
items.desc: Multi-layer resin with 3 rubber layers to cushion every step.

items.name: Hard Court
items.desc: Rigid acrylic finish for a faster and more sensitive bounce.

multisportPage.title: Multisport & Football Courts
multisportPage.subtitle: One space, endless possibilities. Engineering for sports versatility.
multisportPage.description:
Optimizing space is crucial for schools, municipalities, and multi-purpose sports centers. We design and build multisport areas that allow playing 5-a-side football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis on the same surface, reducing management costs without compromising performance.

We select highly durable multi-purpose surfaces (resins or low-maintenance synthetic grass) resistant to intensive foot traffic and use with different footwear. By integrating convertible equipment and anti-climb fencing, we create safe arenas, vandal-resistant and ready for use 365 days a year.
features: Multi-purpose surfaces certified for basketball, volleyball, 5-a-side football, and tennis.
Extremely durable synthetic grass with performance infill for 5/7/11-a-side Football courts.
Multi-color line marking systems for clear identification of each sport.
Accessory structures: integrated goals with hoops, adjustable nets, and benches.
Rigid panel fencing with very high perimeter resistance and ball stop nets.

items.name: Fencing
items.desc: 4.00m h anti-vandalism rigid modules with anti-corrosion treatment.

items.name: Equipment
items.desc: Integrated goal/hoop systems in galvanized steel with plexiglass backboards.

items.name: Multi-Turf
items.desc: 22mm synthetic grass specific for 5-a-side football and amateur tennis.

items.name: Polyurethane
items.desc: Seamless elastic surface for basketball and school activities.

coperturePage.title: Sports Covers
coperturePage.subtitle: Total shielding, perfect light. Maximize your facility's yield.
coperturePage.description:
A professional sports cover transforms a seasonal court into a continuous income structure 365 days a year, regardless of weather conditions. We design and install fixed and air-dome covers with a contemporary design and high energy efficiency.

Our premium tensile structures are made with double-coated PVC membranes, specifically treated for thermal insulation and to mitigate the condensation effect. Thanks to custom design, we guarantee optimal playing heights for WPT, ITF, and FITP standards, combining extreme functionality and architectural aesthetics.
features: Single or double membrane air-dome covers for maximum insulation.
Arch tensile structures in steel or glulam with high aesthetic value.
Translucent fabrics that allow natural daylighting reducing energy costs.
Lateral sliding opening systems for ventilation during the summer season.
Flush integration of LED lighting to eliminate shadow zones.

items.name: Laminated Wood
items.desc: Certified Abete GL24 arches, natural beauty and structural stability.

items.name: PVC Membrane
items.desc: 900g/sqm double-coated polyester fabric, flame retardant and anti-UV.

items.name: Steel
items.desc: Hot-dip galvanized calendered beams for free spans up to 40 meters.

surfaces.title: Flooring
surfaces.subtitle: The foundations for a perfect cover.

items.name: Screed
items.desc: Reinforced concrete with quartz finish or draining asphalt.

hero.title: Building Spaces of Sporting Excellence
hero.subtitle: Innovation, engineering, and design for premium sports facilities.

about.title: About Us
about.content: PlayInnovation Group is a leading company in the design and construction of high-end sports facilities. With years of experience in the sector, we fuse the most advanced engineering techniques with a modern and functional aesthetic. Our goal is to elevate the playing experience through durable, safe, and visually striking infrastructures. We work closely with clubs, investors, and public administrations to turn every vision into reality.

items.title: Premium Quality
items.desc: We select only the best materials to ensure durability and top-level performance over time.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We are constantly looking for new technological and construction solutions to exceed current standards.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: A team of dedicated professionals follows every project from the initial consultation phase to the turnkey delivery.
